description: Naive flat-file memory storage for personal AI assistant. All memories stored as plain text files in a single directory. No indexing, no metadata, no structure.
known_limitations: No structured metadata — cannot filter by topic, tag, or entity
Search is brute-force grep across all files — O(n) with file count
No distinction between working, episodic, and semantic memory
Single flat directory becomes unwieldy past ~1000 files
Plain text only — no embedded images, tables, or structured data
